notes:
Some guides/instructions mention renaming the video directory. I did that and I thought the game is broken. Because it crashed after character creation. 

DO NOT RENAME THE VIDEO DIRECTORY!

I undid it and the game worked fine and the video played also.

The only fix that you will need is to add vcrun2017 with winetricks.

Run in your terminal WINEPREFIX='/home/**USERNAME**/.local/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/570940/pfx' winetricks -q vcrun2017 and no additional tweaks are needed.

title: DARK SOULS™: REMASTERED

notes:
Forget my previous review, it workes perfectly with no crashes at all.
Install the game and run it once.
To get it running try to install vcrun2017 on both of these paths:

Run the following commands in the terminal:
WINEPREFIX=/home/USERNAME/.local/share/steam/steamapps/compatdata/570940/pfx/ winetricks

WINEPREFIX=/home/USERNAME/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/570940/pfx/ winetricks

Then select "Select the default wineprefix" and then "Install a Windows DLL or component". - Select "vcrun2017" and click Ok.

After that your good to go.

notes:
Game wouldn't start, so I installed 'vcrun2017' with winetricks by downloading the winetricks script, making it executable with `chmod +x winetricks`, and running `WINEPREFIX=/home/MYUSERHERE/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/570940/pfx ./winetricks vcrun2017`

Then, the game would crash after character creation, so I removed/renamed the movww folder, installed 'binkw32' with winetricks, and disabled steam cloud save. After all this the game seems to run with no issues.

notes: Game was crashing after character creation, but as of Proton 4.2-1, the game runs perfectly! All you need to do is install vcrun2017 with winetricks, by running `WINEPREFIX="$HOME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/570940/pfx" ./winetricks -q vcrun2017`.
title: DARK SOULS™: REMASTERED

notes: No longer crashes after character creation with Proton 4.2-1. Generally runs great, but has some small jitters when (I assume) shaders are being built. Nothing that detracts from the experience, though. As stated earlier, vcrun2017 needs to be installed in the wine prefix in order to launch the game. This is done as follows: `WINEPREFIX="<PATH_TO_STEAM>/steamapps/compatdata/570940/pfx" winetricks -q vcrun2017`.
